stub: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background.
personalization: She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs.
substantive: She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines.
justification: In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole.
responsiveness: Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
text: She is a Conservative MP who comes from a white middle class background. She is from your constituency. She tends to vote in accordance with the instructions of her party, even when that conflicts with her own beliefs. She opposes the construction of thousands of new onshore wind turbines. In political debates, she regularly uses arguments that appeal to society as a whole. Asked recently about the role and duties of politicians, she said: “In a democracy, the voter has the last word. That is why I always listen and respond to what voters want.”
